steps.title: Simplify both sides
steps.content: For infinitely many solutions, the equation must be true for every value of $x$. Expand each side: $$a(5x-15)+4a=5ax-15a+4a=5ax-11a$$ $$5(ax-3a)-20=5ax-15a-20$$

steps.title: Match the constant terms
steps.content: The $5ax$ terms already match, so the constant terms must also match: $$-11a=-15a-20$$ $$4a=-20$$ $$a=-5$$

steps.title: Choose the answer
steps.content: Only $a=-5$ makes the two sides identical: both become $-25x+55$. Choice A — -5 only.
